rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the placement of the generic finrank lemmas (in Quadratic.lean) vs. multiquadratic-specific degree theorems (in new Degree.lean). Review 1's sole finding (transitive import of finrank_sup_adjoin_simple_eq_mul_two via SquareClass) is real per the diff but a minor hygiene preference, not material to placement; acting on it yields no meaningfully better PR than Review 2's sound approve (which notes the chain is fine).
